DefaultDescriptionFormat.SourceString: Water is a strange thing, required by all living things, yet capable of ending civilisations. Rain is vital to the survival of a kingdom, yet its citizens lament the grey clouds forming overhead. Mages understand that water is a special sort of power, capable of being shaped in a multitude of ways. Water runes embody this fluidity of concept, finding use in many different types of spell.
